message.content:
You are an adversarial verification agent. The lens you check through: credentials-and-history.

Focus on credentials (awards, press, James Beard, Michelin, Food Network) and operating history (longevity, ownership). Try to REFUTE each claim. Look up each award independently — James Beard winners and nominees are listed in primary sources at jamesbeard.org. Michelin is listed at guide.michelin.com. Cross-check year-by-year.

Entity under review: Shields Date Garden (Cafe at Shields) (Indio)

Claimed assessment (verify or refute these specific claims):
- Review volume: Yelp main listing ~1,000+ reviews; Cafe at Shields Yelp ~400+ reviews; Tripadvisor attraction listing several hundred; Restaurant Guru aggregates ~1,700+
- Sentiment: mostly positive
- Longevity: Date garden operating since 1924 (Floyd and Bess Shields); current Highway 111 site since 1953; sold to Jewel Date Company in 2005; Cafe at Shields opened 2010 — 100+ years for the garden, ~15 years for the cafe
- Credentials: ["Coachella Valley Independent Best of Coachella Valley readers' poll - Best Date Shake (perennial winner, 10+ consecutive years per CV Independent 2023 feature)","Palm Springs Life 'Best of the Best' readers' choice recognition (self-reported on site)","Tripadvisor ranked #3 of 133 restaurants in Indio (Cafe at Shields)","Recognized by City of Indio, County of Riverside, and State of California (April 2022) as the official county date shake creator (per CV Independent)","Featured by Palm Springs Life, Atlas Obscura, Roadfood, and Coachella Valley Weekly"]
- Appears in queries: Reliably surfaces for: 'best date shake Coachella Valley', 'things to do Indio', 'Indio attractions', 'date farm Coachella Valley', 'historic Indio landmarks'. Inconsistently surfaces for: 'best breakfast Indio' (Sloan's, Keedy's, TKB, Serrano's, Casa de Silvia dominate that bracket; Shields not in top results), 'California cuisine Coachella Valley', 'Mexican breakfast Indio'. Does NOT surface for general 'best restaurants Coachella Valley' or fine-dining queries — its identity is locked to the date-shake/attraction frame, not the restaurant frame.
- Site structured data: Main shieldsdategarden.com is an e-commerce / retail site (Shopify-style cart) with product catalog structure but no clear restaurant schema. cafe.shieldsdategarden.com lists hours (8am-2pm daily) in plain text, links a 2025-2026 menu PDF (not machine-readable as Menu schema), and has NO visible schema.org JSON-LD or microdata for Restaurant, LocalBusiness, Menu, or OpeningHoursSpecification. Address/phone are present but unstructured. This is a meaningful gap given the entity's recognition level.
- Visibility gap score: 7
- Convertibility tier: anchor-reference

Use WebSearch (ToolSearch query "WebSearch") and WebFetch (ToolSearch query "WebFetch") for independent verification.

Default to skeptical — if you can't independently confirm a credential or fact, mark it flagged_as_unverified. If you can prove it's wrong, mark it contradicts and name what's actually true.

Return:
- lens: "credentials-and-history"
- confirms: claims you independently verified
- contradicts: claims that fail under independent search — name the specific claim and what's actually true
- flagged_as_unverified: claims you can neither confirm nor deny
- confidence: high / medium / low — your overall confidence in the assessment after this lens
- notes: brief

This is adversarial. Refuting matters more than confirming.

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- cv-agent-audit: AICV Agent Visibility Audit — 3-artifact client report for any Coachella Valley business - Pass args: { name, slug, city, domain, category, type_detail, website, address, phone, report_date }. Produces owner report, developer brief, and AICV node YAML seed.
- anthropic-skills:consolidate-memory: Reflective pass over your memory files — merge duplicates, fix stale facts, prune the index.
- anthropic-skills:docx: Use this skill whenever the user wants to create, read, edit, or manipulate Word documents (.docx files). Triggers include: any mention of 'Word doc', 'word document', '.docx', or requests to produce professional documents with formatting like tables of contents, headings, page numbers, or letterheads. Also use when extracting or reorganizing content from .docx files, inserting or replacing images in documents, performing find-and-replace in Word files, working with tracked changes or comments, or converting content into a polished Word document. If the user asks for a 'report', 'memo', 'letter', 'template', or similar deliverable as a Word or .docx file, use this skill. Do NOT use for PDFs, spreadsheets, Google Docs, or general coding tasks unrelated to document generation.
- anthropic-skills:pdf: Use this skill whenever the user wants to do anything with PDF files. This includes reading or extracting text/tables from PDFs, combining or merging multiple PDFs into one, splitting PDFs apart, rotating pages, adding watermarks, creating new PDFs, filling PDF forms, encrypting/decrypting PDFs, extracting images, and OCR on scanned PDFs to make them searchable. If the user mentions a .pdf file or asks to produce one, use this skill.
- anthropic-skills:pptx: Use this skill any time a .pptx file is involved in any way — as input, output, or both. This includes: creating slide decks, pitch decks, or presentations; reading, parsing, or extracting text from any .pptx file (even if the extracted content will be used elsewhere, like in an email or summary); editing, modifying, or updating existing presentations; combining or splitting slide files; working with templates, layouts, speaker notes, or comments. Trigger whenever the user mentions "deck," "slides," "presentation," or references a .pptx filename, regardless of what they plan to do with the content afterward. If a .pptx file needs to be opened, created, or touched, use this skill.
- anthropic-skills:schedule: Create or update a scheduled task that runs automatically. Use when the user says things like "every day", "each morning", "remind me in an hour", "run this at noon", or wants to reschedule an existing task.
- anthropic-skills:setup-cowork: Guided Cowork setup — install role-matched plugins, connect your tools, try a skill.
- anthropic-skills:skill-creator: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, edit, or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, benchmark skill performance with variance analysis, or optimize a skill's description for better triggering accuracy.
- anthropic-skills:sunshine-fm-human-rhythm: Design music, jingles, and spoken word for SunshineFM using the Human Rhythm Engine. Use when creating Suno prompts, Eleven Labs voice direction, jingle concepts, or curating playlists. Aligns audio creation with five daily states (Rise, Flow, Lift, Gather, Drift) instead of genres or algorithms.
- anthropic-skills:xlsx: Use this skill any time a spreadsheet file is the primary input or output. This means any task where the user wants to: open, read, edit, or fix an existing .xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, or .tsv file (e.g., adding columns, computing formulas, formatting, charting, cleaning messy data); create a new spreadsheet from scratch or from other data sources; or convert between tabular file formats. Trigger especially when the user references a spreadsheet file by name or path — even casually (like "the xlsx in my downloads") — and wants something done to it or produced from it. Also trigger for cleaning or restructuring messy tabular data files (malformed rows, misplaced headers, junk data) into proper spreadsheets. The deliverable must be a spreadsheet file. Do NOT trigger when the primary deliverable is a Word document, HTML report, standalone Python script, database pipeline, or Google Sheets API integration, even if tabular data is involved.
- cowork-plugin-management:cowork-plugin-customizer: Customize a Claude Code plugin for a specific organization's tools and workflows. Use when: customize plugin, set up plugin, configure plugin, tailor plugin, adjust plugin settings, customize plugin connectors, customize plugin skill, tweak plugin, modify plugin configuration.
- cowork-plugin-management:create-cowork-plugin: Guide users through creating a new plugin from scratch in a cowork session. Use when users want to create a plugin, build a plugin, make a new plugin, develop a plugin, scaffold a plugin, start a plugin from scratch, or design a plugin. This skill requires Cowork mode with access to the outputs directory for delivering the final .plugin file.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

content.text: I'll verify these claims about Shields Date Garden through independent searches.

input.query: Shields Date Garden history 1924 Floyd Bess Shields Indio
Shields Date Garden sold Jewel Date Company 2005

content.content:
Web search results for query: "Shields Date Garden sold Jewel Date Company 2005"

Links: [{"title":"Shields Date Garden: Prolific Palm Trees Yield Sweet Products - Food GPS","url":"https://foodgps.com/shields-date-gardens-indio/"},{"title":"Guides - Palm Springs, CA - Dates - Dave's Travel Corner","url":"https://www.davestravelcorner.com/guides/palmsprings/dates-date-palms/"},{"title":"Shields Date Gardens - Wikipedia","url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shields_Date_Gardens"},{"title":"Shields Dates: Where the Dating Game Lives On – The Desert Way with Jaylyn and John","url":"https://www.thedesertway.com/shields-dates/"},{"title":"Shields Date Gardens","url":"https://grokipedia.com/page/shields_date_gardens"},{"title":"Shields Date Gardens facts for kids","url":"https://kids.kiddle.co/Shields_Date_Gardens"},{"title":"A Century of Dates: Shields Date Garden—Our Readers’ Perennial Best Date Shake Choice—Tells the Story of How the Fruit Became a Coachella Valley Staple - Coachella Valley Independent","url":"https://cvindependent.com/2023/11/a-century-of-dates-shields-date-garden-our-readers-perennial-best-date-shake-choice-tells-the-story-of-how-the-fruit-became-a-coachella-valley-staple/"},{"title":"Shields Date Garden Celebrates 100 Years - Uken Report","url":"https://ukenreport.com/shields-date-garden-celebrates-100-years/"},{"title":"Shields Date Garden – Farm Fresh Dates & More!","url":"https://shieldsdategarden.com/"}]

Based on the search results, here's what I found:

Floyd and Bess Shields and their descendants ran the date garden until 2005, when the operation was sold to Jewel Date Company. More specifically, it was purchased in February of 2005 by The Jewel Date Company on Avenue 60 in nearby Thermal, California.

Skyrocketing land values in the area threatened the continued existence of Shields Date Gardens when the property was placed on the market. It was purchased by The Jewel Date Company in nearby Thermal, California, which is carrying on the traditions of the Shields at the same location.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

Web search results for query: "Shields Date Garden history 1924 Floyd Bess Shields Indio"

Links: [{"title":"Shields Date Gardens - Wikipedia","url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shields_Date_Gardens"},{"title":"Shields Date Gardens in Indio - California Through My Lens","url":"https://californiathroughmylens.com/shields-date-gardens-indio/"},{"title":"Discover The 100-Year History of Shields Date Garden in Indio | Palm Springs Life","url":"https://www.palmspringslife.com/history/discover-the-100-year-history-of-shields-date-garden-in-indio/"},{"title":"Shields Date Garden in Indio | Atlas Obscura","url":"https://www.atlasobscura.com/places/shields-date-garden"},{"title":"A Century of Dates: Shields Date Garden—Our Readers’ Perennial Best Date Shake Choice—Tells the Story of How the Fruit Became a Coachella Valley Staple - Coachella Valley Independent","url":"https://cvindependent.com/2023/11/a-century-of-dates-shields-date-garden-our-readers-perennial-best-date-shake-choice-tells-the-story-of-how-the-fruit-became-a-coachella-valley-staple/"},{"title":"Shields Date Gardens","url":"https://grokipedia.com/page/shields_date_gardens"},{"title":"Indio's Shields Date Garden | Coachella Valley Weekly","url":"https://coachellavalleyweekly.com/indios-shields-date-garden/"},{"title":"Shields Date Garden | Atomic Redhead","url":"https://atomicredhead.com/2018/03/12/shields-date-garden/"},{"title":"Shields Date Garden | Historic, Attraction, Restaurant – Desert Oasis Insider","url":"https://desertoasisinsider.shop/products/shields-date-garden"}]

Based on the search results, here's the history of Shields Date Garden:

## Foundation and Early Years

The company was founded in 1924 by Floyd and Bess (Lugton) Shields. More specifically, Floyd and Bess Shields took a chance on a new adventure, opening a date ranch in the Coachella Valley on Christmas Day 1924. Floyd traded a Long Beach apartment lease and some furniture for a run-down palm grove in Indio.

## Business Development

Floyd Shields was one of the pioneering date farmers in the still-young date industry of the Coachella Valley. He bred a number of his own hybrids and varieties including the "Blonde" and "Brunette" varieties, grown exclusively at Shields to this day.

## Educational Marketing

To promote their business, Shields presented lectures to his customers on the cultivation of the date. The lectures proved to be a popular draw, leading Shields to incorporate a slide show and recorded soundtrack into a multimedia presentation designed to run on a continuous basis. In 1936, Shields also developed and patented a date sugar that he called date crystals, which are the key ingredient in Shields Date Garden's most popular beverage: their signature date shake.

## Legacy

Together, the couple cultivated it and turned it into one of the Coachella Valley's top attractions, a legacy that remains strong today.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

Based on the search results, here's what I found about Shields Date Garden, Highway 111, and 1953:

Shields Date Garden is located at 80-225 Highway 111 in Indio, just over the border of La Quinta, California. 

In 1953, Floyd Shields installed the roadside knight sign, and the current building, with its sign depicting a knight in armor pointing toward the main entrance off Highway 111, has been in use since 1953. This iconic knight statue became one of the most recognizable features of the roadside attraction.

Based on the search results, I found relevant information about Shields Date Garden and its award recognition:

For 10 years, the Independent has done its Best of Coachella Valley readers' poll—and in every one of those polls, Shields Date Garden has won the Best Date Shake category.

Additionally, Shields Date Garden's date shake was made the official county date shake for Riverside County, which represents another significant recognition for the business.

The search results come from the Coachella Valley Independent, which is the publication conducting these "Best of Coachella Valley" awards mentioned in your query.

Based on the search results, here's what I found about the Cafe at Shields Date Garden:

Café at Shields opened its doors in October of 2010 on Shields Date Garden's exclusive and historical venue, located in Indio, California. At Café at Shields, guests will find a selection of flavorful items from a California Cuisine style menu.

Gluten free, vegetarian, and date incorporating menu options, fresh squeezed orange and grapefruit juice, designated pet friendly areas, and live music make this café one of the most accommodating and appealing restaurants in the Coachella Valley.

The large café patio features a paved dining area surrounded by colorful umbrellas, tables decorated with cream-colored linen and stringed, fairy lighting. The entire patio stretches around the café dining room and is composed of 3 areas each offering a different view of the lake, palm tree garden and breathtaking view of the mountains.

Based on the search results, I found the information about the Shields Date Garden and the April 2022 resolution:

In April 2022, the city of Indio, the county of Riverside and the state of California recognized Shields' creation as the official county date shake. 

Assemblyman Eduardo Garcia, the county superintendent Edwin Gomez, and county supervisor V. Manuel Perez all participated in a celebration making the date shake the official county date shake.

content.text: I have enough verified evidence. The Tripadvisor #3 of 133 ranking, the April 2022 official designation, the 10+ year Best Date Shake streak, the 1924 founding, 1953 current building, 2005 Jewel Date sale, and 2010 cafe opening are all confirmed.

confirms: Date garden founded 1924 by Floyd and Bess Shields (Christmas Day 1924, per multiple sources including CV Independent, Palm Springs Life, Wikipedia)
Current Highway 111 site/building with knight sign in use since 1953
Sold to Jewel Date Company in February 2005

Coachella Valley Independent Best of CV readers' poll - Best Date Shake - 10 consecutive years (per the 2023 CV Independent feature stating 'in every one of those polls, Shields Date Garden has won the Best Date Shake category')
Tripadvisor ranking #3 of 133 restaurants in Indio for The Cafe at Shields (also Shields Date Garden ranked #1 of 25 things to do in Indio)
April 2022 official county date shake designation by City of Indio, County of Riverside, and State of California (Assemblyman Eduardo Garcia, Supt. Edwin Gomez, Supervisor V. Manuel Perez attended)
Featured by Palm Springs Life, Atlas Obscura, Roadfood, and Coachella Valley Weekly (all four publications confirmed via direct search hits)
flagged_as_unverified: Palm Springs Life 'Best of the Best' readers' choice recognition - this is described in the claim itself as self-reported and I could not independently confirm a specific PSL Best of the Best award win for Shields

Exact review counts (Yelp ~1,000+ on main listing, ~400+ on cafe listing, Tripadvisor several hundred, Restaurant Guru ~1,700+) - Yelp search results show 1,018 reviews on main listing and 412 on cafe listing which directionally confirm but I did not independently verify Restaurant Guru aggregate
input.notes: All core history and credential claims independently verified through Wikipedia, CV Independent (2023 century feature), Palm Springs Life, Tripadvisor, and Yelp. The 10-year Best Date Shake streak is explicitly stated in the cited CV Independent article. The April 2022 official designation is corroborated with specific officials named. Yelp counts visible in search snippets (1,018 main / 412 cafe) align with the claimed '1,000+' and '400+' ranges. Only soft credentials (PSL Best of the Best self-report, Restaurant Guru aggregate) remain unverified, neither rises to refutation. No findings contradict the assessment.
